subcodes.first_line: O ye who have been wronged in the path of God! The loved ones of the Almighty have always been exposed to the dire oppression and tyranny
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ستمدیدگان سبیل الهی ظلم و اعتساف مردم بی انصاف همیشه بر اولیای الهی واقع
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
